visual_description: Three men stand in a dimly lit indoor space with muted greenish lighting; the central man, with short gray hair and wearing a gray suit, holds a yellow object and looks upward, while the man to his left, in a dark patterned shirt, gazes forward, and the man to his right, in a black shirt, looks down at his phone. The central man slightly turns his head and body toward the right, while the others remain relatively still. Their postures are upright but relaxed, with minimal movement, and the background features indistinct wall decorations and soft ambient lighting.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone at a moderate pace, with no significant prosody or background noise.
